[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Built truesight-dao-add-contributor CLI + added David Campbell + fixed _NON_CANONICAL_KEYS bug
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/123

  Details:
  ## Summary
  
  Built the `truesight-dao-add-contributor` CLI from scratch and shipped it end-to-end:
  
  ### Phase 1 — CLI Module
  - Researched Edgar's event schema and GAS handler for CONTRIBUTOR ADD EVENT
  - Wrote `add_contributor.py` module + `pyproject.toml` console script entry
  - Merged PR #123 on `dao_protocol`
  - Deployed to autopilot and verified with dry-run
  
  ### Phase 2 — Autopilot Integration
  - Updated `submit_contribution` and `lookup_event_docs` tool descriptions to include CONTRIBUTOR ADD EVENT
  - Merged PR #262 on `truesight_autopilot`
  
  ### Phase 3 — First Contributor Added
  - Successfully submitted David Campbell (david@soha.center) as the first contributor via the CLI
  - Edgar confirmed: status=success, signature_verification=success, googleSheetLogged=true
  
  ### Bug Fix
  - Diagnosed and fixed `_NON_CANONICAL_KEYS` dropping canonical "Type" field for CONTRIBUTION EVENT
  - PR #265 on `truesight_autopilot` — moved the drop check to after canonical label matching
  
  ### Debugging
  - Traced through 24 SSH calls to find the root cause of the normalization bug (should have used read_repo_file instead — lesson learned)
  - Debugged setuptools "UNKNOWN" package name issue (stale egg-info from old setuptools version)
- Contributor(s): Sophia Truesight (admin+sophia@truesight.me)
